description_long: This is a shallow, round bowl with a smooth, matte beige surface and a slightly raised rim. The exterior features a decorative band with a geometric, interwoven pattern in dark brown and tan, encircling the lower half of the bowl. The rim has two subtle, elongated notches on opposite sides, possibly for easier handling or aesthetic effect. The interior is plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's beige color. The bowl appears to be made of ceramic or stoneware, giving it a sturdy and refined appearance. Its design suggests a blend of functional utility and decorative appeal, suitable for both everyday and special occasions.
description: A shallow, beige ceramic bowl with a geometric dark brown band and subtle notches on the rim. The design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular rim, beige color, and the geometric patterned band around the lower exterior.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting one of the rim notches and the depth of the bowl, with the patterned band partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite side of the rim and the continuous geometric band.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the second rim notch and the bowl's shallow profile.
attribute_decorative_patterns: geometric interwoven band in dark brown and tan around the lower exterior
